Name: Label
Description: A display label for the Development Results.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the overall Development Results.

Name: DevelopmentImplementationReference
Description: References the Development Implementation which the results refer to. TypeOfObject should be DevelopmentImplementation

Name: ResultsDate
Description: The date or date range of obtaining results from the development work.

Name: ResultDetail
Description: Details of specific results of the development plan and process. May refer to specific development activities or DevelopmentSteps within a DevelopmentProcess.
